results.live_executive_summary: The Fellowship Foundation (The Family/C Street) retains significant concern status: no criminal convictions or fines on record, but it lost formal control of the National Prayer Breakfast in 2023 amid ethics and transparency pressure, continues active foreign influence activities documented in FARA filings, and funded anti-LGBTQ advocacy abroad in 2023. Current president Katherine Crane leads a deliberately decentralized, opaque structure with ~$10.4M annual revenue and no publicly named board.
